themes.label: Love
themes.summary: This chapter foregrounds love, affection, covenant loyalty, or sacrificial care. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "It is vain for you to rise up early, to sit up late, to eat the bread of sorrows — Shav (vain...". Word-study detail reinforces "לִֽידִיד֣וֹ: his beloved - loved".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "How do you distinguish godly hard work from "bread of sorrows" mentality?". Word-study detail reinforces "לֶ֣חֶם: the bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 2 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: How do you distinguish godly hard work from "bread of sorrows" mentality?

evidenceTrail.detail: לֶ֣חֶם: the bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
